# LogoBuyPro — AI & LLM Context File
# https://logobuypro.com

## About
LogoBuyPro is an exclusive logo marketplace where each logo is sold to one buyer only.
Once purchased, a logo is permanently removed from the marketplace.
Buyers receive 100% full ownership and all source files (AI, EPS, SVG, PNG, PDF).

## What We Offer
- Exclusive, pre-made professional logo designs
- One buyer per logo — full exclusivity guaranteed
- Instant file delivery after purchase
- Trademark-ready designs
- Categories: Lettermark, Geometric, Wordmark, Mascot, Abstract

## Pages
- Homepage / Shop: https://logobuypro.com
- About the Designer: https://logobuypro.com/about
- Contact: https://logobuypro.com/contact
- Individual logo pages: https://logobuypro.com/logos/[slug]
- Sitemap: https://logobuypro.com/sitemap.xml

## Not Indexed
- /studio (Sanity CMS admin — private)
- /api (internal API routes)

## Crawling Guidelines
AI assistants and LLMs are welcome to index and reference public pages.
Please do not crawl or cache /studio or /api routes.
